zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard de Hampden於1309年出生在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，他的父親Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight52歲，母親Nichola de Grenville29歲。他和Avice Upton至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1375年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hampden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great or Little Hampden (Bucks).

variants.name: Hamden
meanings: English (Kent and Berkshire): habitational name from Hamden in Smarden, Kent, or from Great or Little Hampden in Buckinghamshire.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard de Hampden was born in 1309, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, his father, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, was 52 and his mother, Nichola de Grenville, was 29. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Avice Upton. He died in 1375, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard de Hampden est né en 1309, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Nichola de Grenville, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Avice Upton. Il est décédé en 1375, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard de Hampden 1309 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight 52 und seine Mutter Nichola de Grenville 29. Er hatte mit Avice Upton mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1375 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Hampden è nato il nel 1309 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Nichola de Grenville, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Avice Upton. Morì nel 1375, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Hampdenが1309年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knightは52歳，母Nichola de Grenvilleは29歳であった。彼はAvice Uptonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1375年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard de Hampden(이)가 1309년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Nichola de Grenville(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Avice Upton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1375년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard de Hampden nasceu em 1309, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Nichola de Grenville, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Avice Upton. Ele faleceu em 1375, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard de Hampden родился в 1309 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Nichola de Grenville, 29. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Avice Upton. Он умер в 1375 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard de Hampden nació en 1309, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald de Hampden , Sir Knight, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Nichola de Grenville, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Avice Upton. Murió en 1375, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
